university_info.name: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology & Research (VFSTR)

admission_timeline_2026.details: Online application portal opens for V-SAT 2026.
Last date to submit applications online or offline.
Computer-based test conducted in multiple slots across major cities.
V-SAT rank list published on the official admission portal.
Merit-based counseling sessions at Vadlamudi campus.
Orientation and academic sessions begin for B.Tech first year.

steps.name: Online Registration
steps.description: Visit admissions.vignan.ac.in and register using mobile number and email.

steps.name: Application Submission
steps.description: Fill personal and academic details, upload required photos/certificates, and pay a non-refundable application fee of ₹1,200.

steps.name: Entrance Exam
steps.description: Appear for V-SAT, or submit scores of JEE Main or AP/TS EAPCET (EAMCET).

steps.name: Counselling Session
steps.description: Attend physical or online counseling based on rank/percentile. Bring all original certificates for verification.

steps.name: Seat Allotment & Admission Fee Payment
steps.description: Once a seat is allocated, pay the admission processing fee of ₹20,000 (one-time) and the first-year tuition fee.

steps.name: Admission Confirmation
steps.description: Submit final documents and collect your University Admission Letter and ID card.

required_documents: Entrance Exam Rank Card & Admit Card (V-SAT / JEE Main / EAPCET)
Caste Certificate (if claiming reservation / scholarship category)

courses.name: Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics). Must qualify in V-SAT, JEE Main, or EAPCET.
courses.description: Focuses on software development, algorithms, artificial intelligence, operating systems, and computer networks.
courses.career_scope: Software Engineer, Web Developer, System Analyst, Cloud Architect, Data Engineer.

courses.name: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (AI & ML)
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with PCM. Must qualify in V-SAT, JEE Main, or EAPCET.
courses.description: Specialized branch in machine learning, deep learning, computer vision, natural language processing, and neural networks.
courses.career_scope: AI Engineer, ML researcher, Data Scientist, Robotics Specialist.

courses.name: Computer Science & Engineering - Cyber Security
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with PCM. Must qualify in V-SAT, JEE Main, or EAPCET.
courses.description: Provides learning on security architectures, threat mitigation, network security, ethical hacking, and digital forensics.
courses.career_scope: Security Analyst, Penetration Tester, Cybersecurity Consultant, Cryptographer.

courses.name: Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE)
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with PCM. Must qualify in V-SAT, JEE Main, or EAPCET.
courses.description: Covers semiconductor devices, analog/digital circuits, VLSI, signal processing, embedded systems, and communication channels.
courses.career_scope: VLSI Design Engineer, Embedded Developer, Telecom Engineer, Hardware Architect.

courses.name: Biotechnology
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with BiPC (Biology, Physics, Chemistry) or MPC. Must qualify in V-SAT, JEE, or EAPCET.
courses.description: Combines engineering principles with biological sciences for applications in healthcare, genetics, and environment.
courses.career_scope: Bio-informatician, Research Associate, Clinical Data Analyst, Pharmacologist.

courses.name: Agricultural Engineering
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with MPC or BiPC. Must qualify in V-SAT or EAPCET.
courses.description: Applies engineering principles to agricultural production, soil conservation, farming machinery, and food technology.
courses.career_scope: Agricultural Engineer, Irrigation Manager, Food Technologist, Farm Consultant.

courses.name: M.Tech Computer Science & Engineering
courses.eligibility: B.Tech/B.E. in relevant discipline with 50% aggregate. GATE or PGECET qualification required.
courses.description: Advanced postgraduate course focused on distributed systems, data mining, networks, and research practices.
courses.career_scope: Research Scientist, Project Lead, Senior Software Engineer, Academic Lecturer.

courses.name: Master of Business Administration
courses.eligibility: Graduation with minimum 55% aggregate marks. Must clear ICET, CAT, MAT, or VUG-CET.
courses.description: Specializations in Marketing, Finance, HR, Operations, and Business Analytics.
courses.career_scope: Business Consultant, HR Manager, Financial Analyst, Marketing Lead.

courses.name: Master of Computer Applications
courses.eligibility: Graduation in BCA/B.Sc/B.Com with Mathematics at 10+2 level. ICET or qualifying exam score.
courses.description: Advanced software and web application development skills, database management, and mobile computing.
courses.career_scope: Database Administrator, Web Programmer, IT Consultant, Systems Manager.

courses.name: Bachelor of Pharmacy
courses.eligibility: 60% aggregate in 10+2 / Intermediate with MPC or BiPC. AP/TS EAPCET or V-SAT qualification.
courses.description: Comprehensive study of drug formulation, pharmacology, clinical practices, and pharmaceutical chemistry.
courses.career_scope: Pharmacist, Drug Inspector, Quality Analyst, Clinical Trial Specialist.

courses.name: Doctor of Philosophy (Engineering / Science)
courses.eligibility: Master's degree with 55% aggregate. Entrance test followed by interview.
courses.description: Research-oriented doctoral program in engineering, biotechnology, science, and humanities.
courses.career_scope: Academic Professor, Principal Researcher, R&D Lab Advisor.

scholarships.description: VFSTR offers attractive merit-based scholarships covering up to 100% of the tuition fee for engineering and non-engineering streams.
general_rules: Scholarships are applicable on tuition fees only. Registration fees, hostel fees, and exam fees are extra.
To maintain the scholarship in subsequent years, students must maintain a CGPA of 7.0 or above with no active backlogs.
Approximately 25% of seats in each course are reserved for scholarship allotments.

amenities: High-speed Wi-Fi in rooms and corridors
Hygienic vegetarian and non-vegetarian mess food (South Indian & North Indian varieties)
Daily laundry service included in the hostel fee
Fully equipped modern gymnasiums separate for boys and girls
In-house medical center with a resident doctor and 24/7 ambulance support
Indoor games (Table Tennis, Chess, Carrom) and outdoor basketball & shuttle courts
rules: Outings are permitted only on Sundays with prior digital approvals from wardens.
No electrical appliances (heaters, irons) are allowed inside the hostel rooms.

training_programs: Campus Recruitment Training (CRT) starts from the 2nd Year.
Coding workshops in Python, Java, and C++ organized by technical mentors.
Soft skills, mock interviews, and resume-building sessions run by the Training & Placement Cell.
English proficiency programs and Cambridge BEC certifications sponsored by the university.

clubs.name: Vignan Coding Club
clubs.description: Organizes weekly hackathons, coding contests, and algorithm sessions.

clubs.name: Inspiria (Cultural Club)
clubs.description: Fosters dancing, singing, drama, photography, and arts.

clubs.name: Literary Seminars Club
clubs.description: Focuses on public speaking, debate, essay writing, and publication.

clubs.name: E-Cell (Entrepreneurship Cell)
clubs.description: Provides incubation space, mentoring, and startup guides.

festivals.name: Mahotsav
festivals.description: A 3-day mega fest attracting 20,000+ students from across India, featuring technical contests, cultural events, and celebrity nights.

festivals.name: Srujanankura
festivals.description: Showcase of projects, prototypes, papers, and tech innovations.

infrastructure: Central Library with 100,000+ books and access to IEEE, Springer, and Scopus digital libraries.
State-of-the-art research laboratories and clean rooms.
Sports complex with synthetic running track, cricket ground, football field, and tennis courts.
Fully air-conditioned seminar halls and open-air theatres.
